title: AI noise reduction for photos and video in low-light conditions
constraints: All four noise reduction features (useNoiseReduction hook, photo pipeline integration, video pipeline integration, AI Denoise toggle) are already implemented as existing features — do not duplicate or modify them unless a defect is identified.
Do not change the backend schema or Motoko actor.
nonGoals: Adding new noise reduction algorithms beyond the existing bilateral-filter simulation.
Noise reduction for modes other than low-light, Night, and Portrait (already covered by existing logic).
